vocab.meaning: phong cảnh vô song, không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: From the summit of the Alps, I was struck by the unrivalled landscape of jagged peaks and frozen lakes.

vocab.meaning: vùng nông thôn với những đồi núi nhấp nhô
vocab.example: The train ride through Tuscany offered a view of the rolling countryside, dotted with vineyards and ancient villas.

vocab.meaning: một cảnh tượng đáng kinh ngạc, tuyệt đẹp
vocab.example: The Northern Lights dancing across the Arctic sky was truly a sight to behold.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng của đô thị (nhìn từ trên cao)
vocab.example: At night, the endless urban sprawl of Tokyo transforms into a shimmering carpet of neon lights.

vocab.meaning: đường bờ biển hùng vĩ, ấn tượng
vocab.example: The Great Ocean Road is famous for its dramatic coastline and limestone stacks rising from the surf.

vocab.meaning: cây cối xanh tươi mướt mắt
vocab.example: After the monsoon rains, the valley was transformed into a sea of lush greenery.

vocab.meaning: phông nền ngoạn mục, hùng vĩ
vocab.example: The ancient temple was set against a spectacular backdrop of towering limestone cliffs.

vocab.meaning: đường chân trời thành phố lấp lánh
vocab.example: We enjoyed a cocktail while looking out at the glittering skyline of Manhattan from a rooftop bar.

vocab.meaning: trở thành tâm điểm (của tầm nhìn)
vocab.example: In this particular view, the snow-capped Fuji mountain takes center stage against the clear blue sky.

vocab.meaning: dãy núi hiểm trở, gồ ghề
vocab.example: The hike was grueling, but the view of the rugged mountain range made every step worth it.
